---
title: "Schedule"
---

{{< meta course.semester >}}, starting {{< meta course.start-date >}}.

| Week | Lecture | Practical |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 1 | [Sequence Alignment](lectures/01-alignment/index.qmd) | [Pairwise Alignment](practicals/01-alignment/index.qmd) |
| 2 | TODO | TODO |
| 3 | TODO | TODO |

: Course schedule {tbl-colwidths="[10,45,45]"}

::: {.callout-note}
Dates come from `_course.yml`. Rolling the course into a new semester means
editing that one file, not this table.
:::
